OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_1915J_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “19” (Concurrent 1115/1915(j) programs) in any instance 
of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD.
